attributes.title: [vSphere OTel] Virtual Machines
attributes.description: VM-level performance: memory pressure (ballooning, swapping), disk latency, network throughput, and per-VM resource tables from the OTel vcenterreceiver.

params.markdown:
## [vSphere OTel] Virtual Machines

This dashboard focuses on VM-level performance health:
- Memory pressure: ballooning and swapping indicators
- VM disk I/O latency and throughput
- VM network throughput and packet rates
- Per-VM resource usage tables for investigation

query.esql:
FROM metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.memory.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS vms = COUNT_DISTINCT(vcenter.vm.name)

FROM metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.memory.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS vms = COUNT_DISTINCT(vcenter.vm.name)

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.memory.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem = AVG(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.memory.usage))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.memory.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem = AVG(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.memory.usage))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.memory.ballooned IS NOT NULL
| STATS ballooned = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.memory.ballooned)) BY vcenter.vm.name
| WHERE ballooned > 0
| STATS vms_ballooning = COUNT(vcenter.vm.name)

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.memory.ballooned IS NOT NULL
| STATS ballooned = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.memory.ballooned)) BY vcenter.vm.name
| WHERE ballooned > 0
| STATS vms_ballooning = COUNT(vcenter.vm.name)

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.memory.swapped IS NOT NULL
| STATS swapped = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.memory.swapped)) BY vcenter.vm.name
| WHERE swapped > 0
| STATS vms_swapping = COUNT(vcenter.vm.name)

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.memory.swapped IS NOT NULL
| STATS swapped = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.memory.swapped)) BY vcenter.vm.name
| WHERE swapped > 0
| STATS vms_swapping = COUNT(vcenter.vm.name)

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.disk.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS util = AVG(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.disk.utilization))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.disk.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS util = AVG(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.disk.utilization))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.disk.latency.max IS NOT NULL
| STATS lat = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.disk.latency.max))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.disk.latency.max IS NOT NULL
| STATS lat = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.disk.latency.max))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.network.usage IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.object == "*"
| STATS net = AVG(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.network.usage))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.network.usage IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.object == "*"
| STATS net = AVG(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.network.usage))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.network.throughput IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.object == "*"
| STATS throughput = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.network.throughput))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.network.throughput IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.object == "*"
| STATS throughput = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.network.throughput))

FROM metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.memory.usage IS NOT NULL OR vcenter.vm.memory.ballooned IS NOT NULL OR vcenter.vm.disk.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem = AVG(vcenter.vm.memory.usage), ballooned = AVG(vcenter.vm.memory.ballooned), swapped = AVG(vcenter.vm.memory.swapped), disk_util = AVG(vcenter.vm.disk.utilization) BY vcenter.vm.name, vcenter.host.name, vcenter.cluster.name
| SORT mem DESC
| LIMIT 100

FROM metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.memory.usage IS NOT NULL OR vcenter.vm.memory.ballooned IS NOT NULL OR vcenter.vm.disk.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem = AVG(vcenter.vm.memory.usage), ballooned = AVG(vcenter.vm.memory.ballooned), swapped = AVG(vcenter.vm.memory.swapped), disk_util = AVG(vcenter.vm.disk.utilization) BY vcenter.vm.name, vcenter.host.name, vcenter.cluster.name
| SORT mem DESC
| LIMIT 100

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.memory.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.memory.usage)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), vcenter.vm.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.memory.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.memory.usage)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), vcenter.vm.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.memory.ballooned IS NOT NULL
| STATS ballooned = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.memory.ballooned)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), vcenter.vm.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.memory.ballooned IS NOT NULL
| STATS ballooned = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.memory.ballooned)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), vcenter.vm.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.memory.swapped IS NOT NULL
| STATS swapped = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.memory.swapped)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), vcenter.vm.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.memory.swapped IS NOT NULL
| STATS swapped = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.memory.swapped)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), vcenter.vm.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: VM Max Disk Latency Over Time

query.esql:
TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.disk.latency.max IS NOT NULL
| STATS lat = MAX(MAX_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.disk.latency.max)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), vcenter.vm.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.disk.latency.max IS NOT NULL
| STATS lat = MAX(MAX_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.disk.latency.max)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), vcenter.vm.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.disk.throughput IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.object == "*"
| STATS throughput = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.disk.throughput)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.direction
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.disk.throughput IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.object == "*"
| STATS throughput = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.disk.throughput)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.direction
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.network.throughput IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.object == "*"
| STATS throughput = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.network.throughput)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.direction
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.network.throughput IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.object == "*"
| STATS throughput = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.network.throughput)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.direction
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: VM Network Packet Rate Over Time

query.esql:
TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.network.packet.rate IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.object == "*"
| STATS pps = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.network.packet.rate)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.direction
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.network.packet.rate IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.object == "*"
| STATS pps = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.network.packet.rate)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.direction
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.memory.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.memory.usage)), ballooned = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.memory.ballooned)), swapped = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.memory.swapped)) BY vcenter.vm.name, vcenter.host.name
| SORT mem DESC
| LIMIT 20

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.memory.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.memory.usage)), ballooned = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.memory.ballooned)), swapped = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.memory.swapped)) BY vcenter.vm.name, vcenter.host.name
| SORT mem DESC
| LIMIT 20

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.disk.latency.max IS NOT NULL
| STATS lat = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.disk.latency.max)), disk_util = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.disk.utilization)) BY vcenter.vm.name, vcenter.host.name
| SORT lat DESC
| LIMIT 20

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.disk.latency.max IS NOT NULL
| STATS lat = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.disk.latency.max)), disk_util = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.disk.utilization)) BY vcenter.vm.name, vcenter.host.name
| SORT lat DESC
| LIMIT 20
